acceptance_criteria.text: Agents UI shows active version and feedback impact clearly.
Generic agents do not dispatch externally and require approval.
Changes were committed, pushed, and deployed between steps.

proof: browser smoke created document agent, ran it, reviewed result, submitted feedback

commands_for_fresh_verifier: cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose exec -T app env SMOKE_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000 python /app/scripts/smoke_agent_blueprint_generic_boundaries.py
known_gaps: Browser automation used ASCII input due missing virtual clipboard; UI flow was still completed through the wizard.
Server checkout remains dirty, so smoke script was copied into the running app container for execution.
